summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Reeve landing page light/dark theme toggle feature. All 13 requested features tested and passing: dark mode default, theme toggle with correct icons, light mode activation, theme persistence via localStorage, code blocks remain dark in both modes, GraphSimulator works in both themes, FAQ accordion works, responsive design at 1920px/1280px/390px, no console errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light/dark theme toggle fully tested and working. Key implementation details: useTheme hook in App.js manages state, localStorage key is 'reeve-theme', html.light class toggles on document.documentElement. Dark mode: pure black (#000) bg, lighter cyan (#7DE3F4) primary. Light mode: white (#FFFFFF) bg, deeper cyan (#06A5B8) primary. Code blocks intentionally remain dark in both modes (terminal aesthetic).

features_tested.dark_mode_default: PASS - Fresh load with no localStorage shows dark mode (no 'light' class on html)
features_tested.theme_toggle_present: PASS - data-testid='theme-toggle' button in nav top-right area
features_tested.theme_toggle_icon: PASS - Sun icon in dark mode, Moon icon in light mode
features_tested.toggle_to_light: PASS - Clicking adds html.light class, background becomes white (#FFFFFF)
features_tested.toggle_to_dark: PASS - Clicking again removes html.light class, background becomes black (#000)
features_tested.light_mode_contrast: PASS - All text readable, cyan accent (#06A5B8) has sufficient contrast on white
features_tested.code_blocks_dark: PASS - Code blocks (step-01-code, step-02-code, step-03-code, quickstart-mcp, quickstart-python) keep dark terminal styling in both modes
features_tested.graph_simulator_dark: PASS - Nodes, edges, labels visible with proper contrast in dark mode
features_tested.graph_simulator_light: PASS - Nodes, edges, labels visible with proper contrast in light mode
features_tested.graph_controls: PASS - Play/Pause/Reset/Scrubber all work in both themes
features_tested.faq_accordion: PASS - FAQ toggle buttons work in both themes
features_tested.hero_ctas: PASS - Primary CTA (docs), Secondary (#graph), Tertiary (npm) all work
features_tested.nav_anchor_links: PASS - All nav links scroll to correct sections
features_tested.bento_cards: PASS - All 8 feature cards render with hover states in both themes
features_tested.responsive_1920px: PASS - No horizontal overflow in both themes
features_tested.responsive_1280px: PASS - No horizontal overflow in both themes
features_tested.responsive_390px: PASS - No horizontal overflow, nav links hidden, theme toggle visible
